word: H8033 - שָׁם - shâm - shawm - In it

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁם

Transliteration: shâm

Phonetic: shawm

BDB Definition:

  1. there, thither
    1. there
    2. thither (after verbs of motion)
    3. from there, thence
    4. then (as an adverb of time)

Origin: a primitive particle [rather from the relative pronoun, H834]; there (transferring to time) then

TWOT entry: 2404

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
